title: queltia × poculiformis
intro: Queltia × poculiformis, also known as the hybrid Queltia, is a plant species resulting from the cross-breeding of Queltia gracilis and Poculiflorus. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Queltia × poculiformis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Queltia × poculiformis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and infusing them in hot water or oil.
